牱पये [फा.सं. ए-60011(06)/20/2016-灹शा. 3(िव.का.)] डा. राजीव मिण, संयु猴 सिचव और िविधक सलाहकार MINISTRY OF LAW AND JUSTICE (Department of Legal Affairs) CORRIGENDAM New Delhi, the 14th September, 2018. G.S.R. 880(E).— The Quantum of claim for payment of one-time mediation fee by the parties to be shared equally to the authority was specified in Schedule-II of the Commercial Court (Pre-Institution Mediation and Settlement) Rules, 2018, and the same was published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), issue no. G.S.R. 606 (E) dated 3rd July, 2018, as under: SCHEDULE-II Mediation Fee [See Rule 11] S.No. QUANTUM OF CLAIM MEDIATION FEE PAYABLE TO AUTHORITY (in Indian rupees). 1. From Rs. 3,00,000 to Rs.10,00,000. Rs. 15,000/- 2. From Rs. 10,00,000. to Rs. 50,00,000. Rs. 30,000/- 3. From Rs. 50,00,000. to Rs. 1,00,00,000. Rs. 40,000/- 4. From Rs.1,00,00,000. to Rs.3,00,00,000. Rs. 50,000/- 5. Above Rs. 3,00,00,000. Rs. 75000/- The above quantum of claim may be read as under: SCHEDULE-II Mediation Fee [See Rule 11] S.No. QUANTUM OF CLAIM MEDIATION FEE PAYABLE TO AUTHORITY (in Indian rupees). 1. From Rs. 3,00,000/- upto Rs.10,00,000/- Rs. 15,000/- 2. Above Rs. 10,00,000/- and upto Rs. 50,00,000/- Rs. 30,000/- 3.
